author: govinda dāsa
verses:
vṛṣabhānu nandinī, nava anurāginī,
turite karala abhisāra
saṅginī raṅginī, prema taraṅginī,
mandira hoi bāhāra

caloite caraṇa, nupura tahi̐ bolata,
sumadhura rasāla
haṁsa gamane dhanī, āola vinodinī,
sakhīgaṇa kari sei sātha

rasika nāgara vara, vidagadha śekhara,
turite milala dhanī pāśa
du̐hu dohā daraśane, ulasita locane,
nirakhata govinda dāsa
en_translation:
The daughter of Vṛṣabhānu, newly filled with love, quickly set out for Her secret meeting. Her cheerful companions, like waves of love, emerged from the palace.

As Her feet moved, Her anklets jingled, producing a very sweet and charming sound. With a swan-like gait, that delightful Lady arrived, accompanied by Her friends.

The playful and clever Lord Kṛṣṇa, the crest-jewel of the wise, quickly met the Lady by Her side. As They both gazed upon each other, Their eyes shone with joy, as observed by Govinda Dāsa.
